items.claim: Alicia Ellison's power is questionable because his previous opponents were not professional-level athletes.
items.quote: The problem is he's fighting like pregnant men. He's fighting morbidly obese truckers. You know what I mean? It just does not it doesn't these guys don't look like pro athletes to me.

items.claim: Alicia Ellison lacks the necessary skill set and confidence to compete in the UFC.
items.quote: He's like, he shouldn't be in the UFC. Too many holes and his confidence isn't there.

items.claim: Alicia Ellison has 'pillow hands' and lacks knockout power.
items.quote: I guess he said [__] pillow hands

items.claim: Gable Stevenson has only been fighting for eight months.
items.quote: He's only been fighting for eight months.

items.claim: Alicia Ellison has been fighting for four years, including an amateur career.
items.quote: Alicia Ellison's been fighting for four years. He had the normal amateur run before pro.

items.claim: Alicia Ellison's loss to Brando Paris was due to being hurt rather than pulling guard.
items.quote: He got hurt. He fell to his back. tried to survive down there and did not.

items.claim: Gable Stevenson will likely win the fight inside the distance, specifically in the first round.
items.quote: I think Gable Stevenson's, you know, very freaking likely going to win this fight inside the distance, by the way, probably the first round.
